name: writers-workbench
description: The Writers Workbench — SaaS dashboard for The Author Agent

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm -w client run build && npm -w server run build
scripts.lint: npm -w client run lint && npm -w server run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w client run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck
